name: JoAi: Get Agent Setting

description.en: Retrieve a previously saved agent setting and pass it to the next warp.
description.de: Rufe eine gespeicherte Agenteneinstellung ab und übergebe sie an den nächsten Warp.
description.es: Retrieve a previously saved agent setting and pass it to the next warp.
description.fr: Retrieve a previously saved agent setting and pass it to the next warp.
description.ro: Retrieve a previously saved agent setting and pass it to the next warp.
description.it: Retrieve a previously saved agent setting and pass it to the next warp.

bot: Fetches an agent setting. If 404/VALUE null: tell user to run setup first.
